Name: Harold Death Esq
Effect: You may play any card from Death's Domain for their cost +1 Guthix devotion
FlavorText: Death, the inexorable, comes to us all.

Name: Muncher
Effect: If Harold Death Esq is also on the owner's board, gain +4 Defense and HP
FlavorText: Has an acquired taste for postmen

Name: Blue Wizard
Effect: Once per turn, when you cast a spell Blue Wizard gains +1 attack till the end of the turn

Name: Dark Wizard
Effect: Once per turn, when you cast a spell Dark Wizard can deal 1 typeless damage immediately to a target without tapping

Name: Farmer
Effect: Reduce the cost of all Livestock by 1 Guthix

Name: Master Farmer
Effect: Gain 2 Sprouting Growths: 0 Guthix Spell Token with Gain 1 Guthix Devotion this turn

Name: Tool Leprechaun
Effect: Reduce the cost of all Farmers by 1 Guthix

Name: Monk
Effect: Upon entering, target an adventurer. That adventurer must destroy an equiped armour or weapon of their choosing.

Name: Town Crier
Effect: Upon entering, you may view the top card of your deck. You then may return it to the top, or place it on the bottom of your deck.

Name: Banker
Effect: Banker has +X attack, where X is the number of Equipment Bank slots with equipment in them

Name: Perdu, Finder of Lost Property
Effect: You may play any Equipment card from Death's Domain for their cost

Name: Frog Princess
Effect:
Upon entering, target a monster. The owner of that monster must pay a devotion to Guthix, or that monster is turned into a 2/1/2 Frog token. 

If the Frog Prince is also in play on the owner's board, other Frogs including the Frog Prince gain +2 Attack, Defense, and HP

Name: Frog Prince
Effect:
Upon entering, target a monster. The owner of that monster must pay a devotion to Guthix, or that monster is turned into a 2/1/2 Frog token.

If the Frog Princess is also in play on the owner's board, other Frogs including the Frog Princess gain +2 Attack, Defense, and HP

Name: Big Mo
Effect:
Tap & Pay 1 Guthix: Gain an Easy Clue Scroll
Tap & Pay 3 Guthix: Gain a Hard Clue Scroll
Tap & Pay 5 Guthix: Gain a Master Clue Scroll

Name: The Mimic
Effect: The Mimic cannot be killed - instead, if it would otherwise die or be removed, it disguises itself to recover for the rest of that turn and during the owner's next turn. It cannot perform actions or be targeted during that turn. The Mimic's Attack, Defense, and HP are equal to the number of Clue Steps completed.

Name: Saradomin Wizard
Effect:
Upon entering, add 3 Poison counters to target monster.
When Saradomin Wizard dies, you may choose to gain a Hard Clue Scroll.

Name: Zamorak Wizard
Effect: Zamorak Wizard gains +1 attack for every 2 Clue Steps the owner has.

Name: Armadylean Guard
Effect: When Armadylean Guard dies, you may choose to gain a Master Clue Scroll.

Name: Bandosian Guard
Effect: When Bandosian Guard dies, you may choose to gain a Master Clue Scroll.

Name: Double Agent
Effect: Double Agent gains +1 Attack for every 2 Clue Steps the owner has.

Name: Uri
Effect: Upon entering, gain a Hard Clue Scroll. If a Double Agent dies while Uri is in play, the owner of Uri gains 2 Clue Step counters.

Name: Cecilia
Effect: Reduce the cost of all cards containing the keyword Clue Step by 1 Guthix Devotion

Name: Charlie the Tramp
Effect: Upon entering, gain an Easy Clue Scroll.

Name: Sherlock
Effect: Each time you play a Master Clue, you may challenge an opposing player to declare a card type (Devotion, Monster, Spell, Equipment, etc) as well as a devotion type (Guthix, Zamorak, etc). They must then reveal the top card of their deck. If the card type and one of the devotion costs of the card match the two guesses, the target player's Adventurer gains 3 HP and may draw a card. If they only got one wrong, their Adventurer loses 2 HP. If they got both wrong, their Adventurer loses 2 HP and discards the top card of their deck.

Name: Falo the Bard
Effect: Tap: Deal Magic damage equal to your Clue Steps to target monster

Name: Watson
Effect: Costs 1 Guthix less for each Clue Step completed. Upon entering, you may search your deck for Gruff McScruff and add it to your hand, shuffling after.

Name: Gruff McScruff
Effect: Tap: If you do not have a Master Clue Scroll in your hand, you may add one.

Name: Reldo Trimmly
Effect: Tap: Gain an Easy Clue Scroll

Name: Jorral
Effect: Tap & Pay 2 Adventurer HP: Gain a Master Clue Scroll

Name: Bee Keeper
Effect: Upon entering, create 3 Bees on the owner's board

Name: Sergeant Damien
Effect: All monsters on the owner's board gain +1 Attack, Defense, and HP

Name: Drunken dwarf
Effect: Upon entering, grants a Beer and Kebab

Name: Evil Bob
Effect: Upon entering, choose a target. That target cannot attack or perform actions until the owning player casts a Food spell on Evil Bob

Name: Postie Pete
Effect: Upon entering, draw 1 card

Name: Freaky Forester
Effect: Upon entering, create a One Tailed Pheasant, Two Tailed Pheasant, Three Tailed Pheasant, and a Four Tailed Pheasant

Name: Genie
Effect: Tap: This card can be treated as a Devotion of your choosing.

Name: Dr Jekyll
Effect: Upon entering, you may gain a Strength Potion. If you do not, send this card to your Death's Domain and put Mr. Hyde directly into play

Name: Mysterious Old Man
Effect: Upon entering, choose one: 1) Gain Beer and Kebab 2) Search your deck for a Mime and add it to your hand,  shuffling after 3) Search your deck for a Devotion of your choice and put it into play tapped, shuffling after

Name: Mime
Effect: Upon entering, copy target monster's Attack, Defense, and HP

Name: Sandwich Lady
Effect: Upon entering, choose to gain either a Triangle Sandwhich or a Stale Baguette

Name: Harlan, Melee Tutor
Effect: Upon entering, grant owning player's Adventurer +1 attack permanently. While this card is in play, whenever the owner's Adventurer has a Melee Weapon equipped, the Adventurer gains an additional +1 attack
FlavorText: Ready to teach swordplay to any upcoming heros.

Name: Nemarti, Ranged Tutor
Effect: Upon entering, grant owning player Adventurer +1 attack permanently. While this card is in play, whenever the owner's Adventurer has a Ranged Weapon equipped, the Adventurer gains an additional +1 attack

Name: Mikasi, Magic Tutor
Effect: Upon entering, grant owning player Adventurer +1 attack permanently. While this card is in play, whenever the owner's Adventurer has a Magic Weapon equipped, the Adventurer gains an additional +1 attack

Name: Doomsayer, Danger Tutor
Effect: Upon entering, the target opposing player must reveal their hand. You may then have that player shuffle their hand, afterwhich you choose one card from their facedown hand to be shuffled back into their deck.

Name: Count Check
Effect: Upon entering, target a monster. If that monster has a defense less than 3, destroy it. If it has a defense of 3 or greater, grant it +2 Attack, Defense, and HP.

Name: Johanhus Ulsbrecht
Effect: Other H.A.M. cards gain Agile and +2 attack

Name: Sigmund (HAM)
Effect: Other H.A.M. cards gain +5 attack against non-Human monsters. When attacked, Sigmund gains Protection against the Attack Type of the first monster to attack him

Name: Juna, Guardian of Guthix
Effect: At the start of each of your turns, Juna, Guadian of Guthix creates two Tear of Guthix tokens
FlavorText: Loyal protector of the weeping stones.

Name: Professor Onglewip
Effect: Gains double the stat bonuses from Food spells

Name: Aggie
Effect: Upon entering, search your deck for a Devotion of your choosing and put it into play tapped, then shuffle your deck

Name: Fortunato
Effect: Upon entering, add a Jug of Wine to your hand

Name: Undercover Penguins
Effect: Upon entering, this card is moved to target opposing player's board. Each turn, the owner of this card must reveal a randomly chosen card from their hand to their opponent(s)
FlavorText: This sheep looks suspicious./You can't shear those.

Name: Barb, Banker tutor
Effect: Upon entering, permanently grant the player an additional equipment bank slot

Name: Nigel, Deadman Tutor
Effect: Upon entering, choose a target monster. That monster can no longer gain attack, defense, or health while Nigel is in play

Name: Adam, Ironman Tutor
Effect: Upon entering, if the player has no equipment bank slots at all, gain an Ironman Helm, Ironman Platebody, and Ironman Platelegs

Name: Paul, Ironman Tutor
Effect: Upon entering, the owner sacrifices their equipment bank slots and their Adventurer permanently gains +1 attack and +1 defense for each slot lost. Equipment now gets directly equipped when played with no equip cost.

Name: Tormented Demon
Effect: After Tormented Demon takes damage, it gains Protection against the attack type that damaged it until it is damaged again

Name: The Leviathan
Effect: The Leviathan has Protection against Melee.

Name: Brutus
Effect: All Livestock monsters owned by other players get -2 Attack, -2 Defense

Name: Demonic Brutus
Effect: Upon entering, destroy all other Livestock monsters and gain their attack, defense, and HP. When Demonic Brutus attacks a target, he attacks twice with the second attack dealing half of his Attack value, rounded down.

Name: Brassican Mage
FlavorText: The power of cabbage compels you!
